scripts.test:approval-browser-authority-check: pnpm --filter @runa/db build && pnpm exec tsc && node scripts/approval-browser-authority-check.mjs
scripts.test:approval-persistence-live-smoke: pnpm --filter @runa/db build && pnpm exec tsc && node scripts/approval-persistence-live-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:persistence-release-proof: pnpm --filter @runa/db build && pnpm exec tsc && node scripts/persistence-release-proof.mjs
